ddls:
CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the household was registered */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the household */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category based on household size, income, etc. */,
  "irrigation_count" INTEGER /* Number of irrigation systems allocated to the household */,
  "animal_count" INTEGER /* Number of animals assigned to the household */,
  "household_item_count" INTEGER /* Total household items allocated to the household */,
  "clothing_count" INTEGER /* Number of clothing items provided to the household */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES address ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street number and name */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "state" TEXT /* State abbreviation */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocation" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation record */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household receiving the allocation */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the allocation was made */,
  "allocated_by" TEXT /* Name of the staff member who allocated the resources */,
  "allocation_type" TEXT /* Type of allocation (e.g., irrigation, animals, household items, clothing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocation_allocated_by FOREIGN KEY ("allocated_by") REFERENCES staff ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocation_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allocation_details" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource allocation record */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource allocated (e.g., irrigation system, cow, chair) */,
  "resource_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource allocated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id", "resource_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., administrator, allocator, reporter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_inventory" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource type */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available for allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allocation_history" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation record */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the allocation was made */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household receiving the allocation */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource allocated */,
  "quantity_allocated" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource allocated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allocation_history_resource_type FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type") REFERENCES resource_types ("resource_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., allocation summary, inventory report) */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member who generated the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)
